overview.description: The ALPS Dynamic Core Income ETF (RFCI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed portfolio with broad latitude to invest in various fixed income securities in almost any sector, maturity or credit quality, targeting total return with a five-year investment timeline. RFCI was launched on Jun 14, 2016 and is issued by SS&C.
